sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_col JSON, varchar_col VARCHAR(255));
SELECT id, isnull(json_get(json_col, 'key')) AS is_key_null FROM test_table WHERE isnull(varchar_col) = 1;
SELECT id, (SELECT isnull(json_get(json_col, 'key')) FROM test_table WHERE id = outer.id) AS subquery_is_key_null FROM test_table AS outer;
SELECT id, json_col, COALESCE((SELECT count(*) FROM test_table AS inner WHERE isnull(json_get(inner.json_col, 'key')) = 1), 0) AS null_key_count FROM test_table;
SELECT id, json_col, isnull(json_get(json_col, 'missing_key')) AS is_missing_key_null FROM test_table GROUP BY id, json_col HAVING isnull(json_get(json_col, 'missing_key')) = 1;
WITH calculated_keys AS (SELECT id, json_get(json_col, 'key') AS key_value FROM test_table) SELECT id, isnull(key_value) FROM calculated_keys ORDER BY isnull(key_value) DESC;
SELECT id, json_col, CASE WHEN isnull(json_get(json_col, 'key')) THEN 'Key is NULL' ELSE 'Key has value' END AS key_status FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id INT, json_associated JSON);
SELECT a.id, a.json_col, b.json_associated FROM test_table AS a JOIN join_table AS b ON isnull(json_get(a.json_col, 'key')) = isnull(json_get(b.json_associated, 'key'));
SELECT id, json_col, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY isnull(varchar_col)) AS row_num FROM test_table;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD CONSTRAINT unique_varchar UNIQUE (varchar_col);
